ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school the team belongs to */,
  "school_address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the team competes */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach responsible for the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "coach_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "coach_experience" TEXT /* Relevant experience of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runners" (
  "runner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each runner */,
  "runner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the runner */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the runner belongs to */,
  "grade" INTEGER /* Grade of the runner (e.g., 9, 10, 11, 12) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the runner */,
  "runner_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the runner */,
  "runner_email" TEXT /* Email address of the runner */,
  "runner_profile" TEXT /* Additional information about the runner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("runner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runners_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "competition_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the competition */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the competition is held */,
  "total_teams" INTEGER /* Total number of teams participating */,
  "competition_type" TEXT /* Type of competition */,
  "competition_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the competition */,
  "max_teams" INTEGER /* Maximum number of teams allowed in the competition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition for which the results are recorded */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team for which the results are recorded */,
  "total_time" TEXT /* Total time taken by the team in the competition */,
  "avg_time" TEXT /* Average time per runner for the team in the competition */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the team based on placements */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date of the competition result */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runner_results" (
  "runner_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each runner's result entry */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result entry associated with a competition and team */,
  "runner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the runner who achieved this result */,
  "placement" INTEGER /* Placement of the runner in the competition */,
  "runner_time" TEXT /* Time taken by the runner to complete the competition */,
  "runner_position" INTEGER /* Position of the runner in the competition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("runner_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runner_results_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runner_results_runner_id FOREIGN KEY ("runner_id") REFERENCES runners ("runner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team to whom the notification pertains */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification is to be sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
